title: Creative Tabs +
description: Sorts creative tabs and provides a method to search!
body:
### Sort and Search for Creative Tabs!

This mod sorts all creative tabs alphabetically by their display name (by default)! It also adds a search box 
to the bottom of the creative menu that can be used to search for a specific tab or tabs added by a specific mod.

CT+ also allows for configuration of what's searched for and how tabs are sorted for ease of use.
